subject: fix(icons): generate all 6 icon sizes per spec
body:
Add missing icon.png (1024 main app icon) and splash-icon.png (1024
splash screen). Rename PWA-specific icons with pwa- prefix for clarity:
pwa-192.png, pwa-512.png, pwa-1024-maskable.png.

6 icons total: pwa-1024-maskable (maskable), pwa-512 (any), pwa-192
(any), icon (main app), splash-icon (splash), favicon (48px browser tab).

Updated manifest icons and apple-touch-icon references.

Tags: icons, pwa, build-script
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
